criteriaResults.criterion: Add Task button visible at bottom of each column
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, button present in all 3 columns with correct testids

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking Add Task opens inline form or modal for new task
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, inline form renders with task-form testid

criteriaResults.criterion: Form fields: Title (required), Priority dropdown, Assignee dropdown, Due Date picker
criteriaResults.evidence: All 4 fields verified in code and E2E test
useState initialized to 'medium', E2E test confirms

criteriaResults.criterion: Submitting adds task to that column via DataContext
criteriaResults.evidence: ADD_TASK action dispatched, DataContext reducer handles correctly

criteriaResults.criterion: New task appears at bottom of column immediately
criteriaResults.evidence: Task array append, E2E test confirms immediate visibility

criteriaResults.criterion: Cancel closes form without adding task
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test confirms form closes and task count unchanged
E2E test creates task, reloads, confirms persistence

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking task card opens SlideOver panel from right side
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test confirms dialog opens, SlideOver has justify-end class

criteriaResults.criterion: Panel shows full task details: title, description, priority, assignee, due date, status
criteriaResults.evidence: All 6 fields rendered in detail view, E2E test confirms

criteriaResults.criterion: Panel has edit mode toggle button
criteriaResults.evidence: Edit button present with Pencil icon, E2E test clicks successfully

criteriaResults.criterion: In edit mode, fields become editable form inputs
criteriaResults.evidence: Edit form with 6 input fields, E2E test confirms visibility

criteriaResults.criterion: Save button in edit mode persists changes to DataContext
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test modifies field, saves, confirms change persists

criteriaResults.criterion: Delete button in panel removes task with confirmation
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test confirms modal, deletion, toast notification

criteriaResults.criterion: Close button (X) or clicking outside closes panel
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test confirms X button works, backdrop click handler present
Tailwind animation configured at 300ms, setTimeout matches
E2E test confirms Escape key functionality

e2eResults.preExistingFailuresNote: All 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts due to hardcoded localhost:5174 URL, not regressions from Task 14

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Task 14 implementation complete with full CRUD functionality, form validation, localStorage persistence, and smooth animations. All new E2E tests pass (10/10). All relevant regression tests pass. 8 pre-existing test failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are unrelated to Task 14 (hardcoded URL issue).
